concerns.detail: Added text contains a personal insult characterizing the subject as a 'troublemaker/shit-stirrer' (学术圈的搅屎棍) and attacking their character with unsupported generalizations about spreading rumors, rather than focusing on concrete advising practices.
concerns.excerpt: 学术圈的搅屎棍，擅长把两个毫不相干的人迅速配对散播谣言
